title: Non-record: Linearized Neural Memory + TTT (val_bpb=1.1844)
body:
Non-record submission. Adds a linearized Titans-style neural memory to each block - the cumulative gradient update reduces to causal linear attention via cumsum, so it compiles with fullgraph=True at ~8K
  params/layer overhead. Combined with LoRA TTT, overtone init, 10 layers, FP16 embedding bypass, int6, Muon WD.
  val_bpb: 1.1844 (TTT) / 1.2163 (standard) | 14.5 MB artifact | 8,641 steps @ 69ms
